markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 159-A — Waste collection vehicle

Any motor vehicle which is commonly classified as a garbage truck that is designed for and is used in the collection of refuse and/or recyclable materials.

*Last modified: Nov. 4, 2016*
